business.geography_hint: Rio de Janeiro lakes region, Brazil (pt-BR)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is checking out a restaurant: browsing menu category photos, scanning the 10 unit locations with addresses/hours, then deciding to order or reserve. Browsing photos/menu/locations IS the decision, so place over quick-yes despite ordering being an external redirect.

goal.one_action: order pizza (via delivery site) or reserve a table (via linktr.ee) at one of the units
goal.delegated_to: store (donlealdelivery.com.br + linktr.ee reservations); WhatsApp per-unit; google-forms/on-page form for franchise/event inquiries

structure.archetype_note: Consumer restaurant site (menu + locations + events) fused with a B2B franchise-recruitment page (market stats + opportunity + interest form). Menu page shows only category photos, no item names/prices; ordering + reservations happen off-site.

mapped.observed_as: PEÇA PELO NOSSO SITE / OU FAÇA A RESERVA DA SUA VISITA
BORA COMER PIZZA? four highlights (quality, delivery, handmade, satisfaction)
NÓS SABEMOS QUE VOCÊ QUER VER O CARDÁPIO! / menu category galleries SALGADAS/DOCES/MASSAS
CONHEÇA NOSSAS UNIDADES / Funcionamento Pizzaria (10 locations, addresses, hours)
O MERCADO DA PIZZA NO BRASIL / OPORTUNIDADE DE NEGÓCIO (franchise market stats)
Entre em Contato (franchise + event inquiry forms)

unmapped.observed: SEJA UM FRANQUEADO / QUEM SOMOS — full franchise-recruitment argument (market data, opportunity, differentiators, ABF badge, interest form) targeting a B2B franchisee audience
unmapped.why_no_fit: Section list has no notion of a distinct secondary B2B recruitment funnel bolted onto a consumer place site; individual sub-parts map to results/uniqueMechanism/leadForm but the page as a whole is a different offer to a different audience

unmapped.observed: CONHEÇA NOSSAS UNIDADES — directory of 10 physical locations each with own address/phone/WhatsApp
unmapped.why_no_fit: map-hours implies a single location's map+hours; a multi-branch location directory with per-unit contact CTAs is structurally more than one place block

proposed_new.name: location-directory
proposed_new.evidence: CONHEÇA NOSSAS UNIDADES / repeated 'Unidade [city]' cards: a grid of 10 branch locations each with its own address, phone, and WhatsApp link — a multi-branch directory, not a single map-hours block

proposed_new.name: franchise-recruitment
proposed_new.evidence: /franquias page: 'SEJA UM FRANQUEADO' B2B funnel with market stats (O MERCADO DA PIZZA), business-opportunity data, NOSSOS DIFERENCIAIS, ABF badge, and an interest form/google-form — a franchise-sales secondary audience distinct from the consumer restaurant offer

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; all 4 pages, sections, CTAs, forms, embeds and proof captured verbatim

gap_findings: Multi-branch businesses need a location-directory capability (N units each with own address/phone/WhatsApp) — map-hours only models one place.
A consumer place site can carry a bolt-on B2B franchise-recruitment funnel (market stats + opportunity + interest form) that engines/sections cannot express as a distinct secondary audience/offer.
Menu is photo-category-only with no item names or prices, and ordering/reservation are external redirects — a place whose menu is non-transactional and whose conversion is fully delegated off-site.
